designBrief.silhouette: angled missile pods / flak array plus a visible radar element
requiredComponents: upward-angled missile pods or flak barrels
designBrief.palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a blue faction anti-air platform in an alien RTS. Material: precision-machined composite, clean panel seams. Palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: modular, sensor-studded, ordered geometry, shield emitter nodes. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: single forward cannon (reads as tank). Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless orthographic texture sheet depicting a segment of a sci-fi anti-air platform hull. The material is a cool, deep steel blue, precision-machined composite, showcasing exceptionally clean, razor-sharp panel seams. Throughout the surface, subtle yet striking blue and white emissive accents glow along the edges of select panels and within recessed conduits, suggesting active energy flow. The composite itself is intricately etched with an imaginative alien industrial pattern of interlocking crystalline filigrees and geometric data conduits, giving a highly functional, sophisticated aesthetic without excessive clutter. Rendered completely flat, with no perspective, no baked lighting, and absolutely no text, suitable for perfect tiling.

Generate a seamless orthographic texture tile representing the hull surface of an advanced sci-fi anti-air vehicle. The primary material is a cool, dark steel blue, precision-machined composite, featuring ultra-precise, hair-thin panel gaps that define its modular structure. Bright blue and stark white emissive strip lights and glowing hexagonal vents punctuate the surface, hinting at internal energy pathways and operational status. Imaginative alien industrial detailing manifests as subtly raised, complex sensor arrays with cryptic patterns and recessed, multi-layered maintenance ports with an organic-geometric feel, alongside integrated glyph-like circuit patterns embedded within the composite's inherent structure. The texture is presented as a perfectly flat sheet, devoid of perspective, shadows, or any baked lighting effects, ensuring seamless tiling without any text.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
